identity.canonical_title: Limit Family Smooth Sources Or Relation

theory.canonical_statement: ID5837 records Limit Family Smooth Sources Or Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation.
theory.technical_interpretation: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00_Engine\Lemma-Maker\Prism\Universal_Field_via_Bridge_Tunnel_Theory_SECOND_PASS.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.

latex_blocks: $ limit of a family of smooth sources (or as a distribution with explicit normalization). \section{A Minimal Regulator Template} A practical template for a localized source uses a mollifier: \begin{align} \delta_\epsilon(x) &= \frac{1}{(\sqrt{\pi}\epsilon)^4}\exp\!\left(-\frac{\|x\|^2}{\epsilon^2}\right), \qquad \int_{\mathbb{R}^4}\delta_\epsilon(x)\,d^4x = 1. \end{align} Then a core energy scale $
canonical_equation.source_section_latex: $ limit of a family of smooth sources (or as a distribution with explicit normalization). \section{A Minimal Regulator Template} A practical template for a localized source uses a mollifier: \begin{align} \delta_\epsilon(x) &= \frac{1}{(\sqrt{\pi}\epsilon)^4}\exp\!\left(-\frac{\|x\|^2}{\epsilon^2}\right), \qquad \int_{\mathbb{R}^4}\delta_\epsilon(x)\,d^4x = 1. \end{align} Then a core energy scale $

wolfram_form.existing_from_tex: $ limit of a family of smooth sources (or as a distribution with explicit normalization). \section{A Minimal Regulator Template} A practical template for a localized source uses a mollifier: \begin{align} \delta_\epsilon(x) &= \frac{1}{(\sqrt{\pi}\epsilon)^4}\exp\!\left(-\frac{\|x\|^2}{\epsilon^2}\right), \qquad \int_{\mathbb{R}^4}\delta_\epsilon(x)\,d^4x = 1. \end{align} Then a core energy scale $
